news_items.headline: Source: MLB reduces Contreras ban to 5 games
news_items.summary: Red Sox slugger Willson Contreras had his suspension reduced from seven games to five, and he will be able to participate in the All-Star Game and Home Run Derby.

news_items.headline: Murakami set to return for the White Sox Friday
news_items.summary: Munetaka Murakami is expected to return to the White Sox on Friday after being sidelined by a strained right hamstring.

news_items.headline: Volpe denies 'BS' report that he refused SS move
news_items.summary: Yankees shortstop Anthony Volpe strongly denied a report that he refused to play second base earlier this season, saying he was caught "off guard" by the since-retracted report, which he called "B.S."

news_items.headline: Alan Porter named umpire in MLB All-Star Game
news_items.summary: Alan Porter will be the umpire crew chief and call balls and strikes for Tuesday's All-Star Game at Philadelphia.

news_items.headline: Judge to have rib imaged as Yanks stay cautious
news_items.summary: Aaron Judge will have his injured rib tested during the All-Star break, and the Yankees are hopeful the results show the three-time AL MVP is healing.

news_items.headline: Boston's Suarez to sit out ASG with groin injury
news_items.summary: Red Sox pitcher Ranger Suarez will miss next week's All-Star Game after he was placed on the 15-day injured list on Thursday with a left groin strain.

news_items.headline: MLB reduces Willson Contreras' suspension for scrum with Nationals to 5 games; Red Sox 1B will return after All-Star break
news_items.summary: Washington starting pitcher Cade Cavalli, the instigator in what became a benches-clearing scuffle on June 30 at Fenway Park, also had his seven-game suspension cut down to five games.

news_items.headline: Harper in a hometown Derby? He's in it to win it -- again
Jeremiah Jackson’s clutch pinch-hit drives Orioles to 3-2 win over Cubs
news_items.summary: The infielder’s pinch-hit double scored the O’s a come-from-behind win after an excellent start from Trevor Rogers

news_items.headline: Mark Vientos injury update: Mets first baseman fractures hand vs. Royals
news_items.summary: A checked swing turned into a fractured hand for the struggling Mets infielder, and it may have closed the door on one of the team's deadline options.
